text_raw: Torstein and your comrades are waiting.
text_clean: Torstein and your comrades are waiting.

text_raw: Seems like you fuckwits have somehow forgot why you shouldn't mess with the Black Bears!
text_clean: Seems like you fuckwits have somehow forgot why you shouldn't mess with the Black Bears!

text_raw: So Myurdin sent us to help rouse your memories.
text_clean: So Myurdin sent us to help rouse your memories.

text_raw: That night, kneeling in the dirt, guts spilling out.
text_clean: That night, kneeling in the dirt, guts spilling out.

text_raw: You squealed like hogs at the slaughter!
text_clean: You squealed like hogs at the slaughter!

text_raw: Get the fuck on your feet!
text_clean: Get the fuck on your feet!

text_raw: I'll salt my meat with their bones.
text_clean: I'll salt my meat with their bones.

text_raw: Any bets on who cuts off {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Myordin#Myurdin}'s head first?
text_clean: Any bets on who cuts off {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Myordin#Myurdin}'s head first?

text_raw: Watch me. I'm going to butcher 'em like dogs.
text_clean: Watch me. I'm going to butcher 'em like dogs.

text_raw: Fuck off! Fuck off! Fuck off!
text_clean: Fuck off! Fuck off! Fuck off!

text_raw: Oh, I'm just getting warmed up.
text_clean: Oh, I'm just getting warmed up.

text_raw: How did they get this far?!
text_clean: How did they get this far?!

text_raw: Let's make a fucking mug out of {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Myordin#Myurdin}'s skull!
text_clean: Let's make a fucking mug out of {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Myordin#Myurdin}'s skull!

text_raw: Let's go get us a skull-mug! Come on!
text_clean: Let's go get us a skull-mug! Come on!

text_raw: You always get to have all the fun!
text_clean: You always get to have all the fun!

text_raw: So even you have your limits.
text_clean: So even you have your limits.

text_raw: Hard cockroach to kill, aren't you?
text_clean: Hard cockroach to kill, aren't you?

text_raw: Let's end it for real this time!
text_clean: Let's end it for real this time!

text_raw: Go on, you cunts! You fuckers!
text_clean: Go on, you cunts! You fuckers!

text_raw: A sack of gold to whoever takes his head.
text_clean: A sack of gold to whoever takes his head.

text_raw: Cut him down! Tear the bastard limb from limb!
text_clean: Cut him down! Tear the bastard limb from limb!

text_raw: Anyone?! Finish him now! Destroy him!!
text_clean: Anyone?! Finish him now! Destroy him!!

text_raw: More... I just needed more! A little more power, and he'd be dealt with!
text_clean: More... I just needed more! A little more power, and he'd be dealt with!

text_raw: Kliff... well, this is a surprise!
text_clean: Kliff... well, this is a surprise!

text_raw: Never thought I'd get to kill you twice.
text_clean: Never thought I'd get to kill you twice.

text_raw: There's some use to a bug like you!
text_clean: There's some use to a bug like you!

text_raw: Why don't you scurry around and beg to kiss my boots?
text_clean: Why don't you scurry around and beg to kiss my boots?

text_raw: So... You've tasted true power at last!
text_clean: So... You've tasted true power at last!

text_raw: This is what it means to have power.
text_clean: This is what it means to have power.

text_raw: The power to conquer death itself!
text_clean: The power to conquer death itself!

text_raw: The power to put the world under my heel!
text_clean: The power to put the world under my heel!

text_raw: Do you understand what it means to possess such power?
text_clean: Do you understand what it means to possess such power?

text_raw: We've lost Pailune! What's the plan now?
text_clean: We've lost Pailune! What's the plan now?
